subcodes.first_line: We have this day come unto a garden wherein the trees proclaim: "Dominion belongeth unto God, the Lord" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا اصبحنا الیوم مقبلا الی البستان الذی ینادی فیه الاشجار الملک لله مالک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
